html:
Exclusive to:

The Archive Switch is a Set Piece exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be found in the Ancient Archive biome.

The Archive Switch consists of three Ornate Pedestals. Initially, two hold an Iridescent Gem, while the third is empty. Attempting to place any other gem results in a failure message, but adding a third Iridescent Gem activates the switch. This powers the Archive Chandeliers, Ancient Orchestrina, Ancient Guard Posts, and Fountain of Knowledge.

Activating the switch for the first time immediately sets the Nightmare Cycle to the Nightmare Phase, playing a sound across all underground biomes. Additionally, Nightmare Ramparts will permanently spawn in the Lunar Grotto. The power can be cut by removing an Iridescent Gem.

Ornate Pedestal

EmptyActive

Ornate Pedestals are part of the Archive Switch. Iridescent Gems can be placed in each of the three Ornate Pedestals to activate the switch.

Tips

  • Console command to turn on the Archive Switch: require("debugcommands"); d_activatearchives().

Trivia

  • The Archive Switch was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
  • Outwardly very similar to Ancient Beacon.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Archive Switch
Source
Ancient Archive
Exclusive to:
The Archive Switch is a Set Piece exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be found in the Ancient Archive biome.
The Archive Switch consists of three Ornate Pedestals. Initially, two hold an Iridescent Gem, while the third is empty. Attempting to place any other gem results in a failure message, but adding a third Iridescent Gem activates the switch. This powers the Archive Chandeliers, Ancient Orchestrina, Ancient Guard Posts, and Fountain of Knowledge.
Activating the switch for the first time immediately sets the Nightmare Cycle to the Nightmare Phase, playing a sound across all underground biomes. Additionally, Nightmare Ramparts will permanently spawn in the Lunar Grotto. The power can be cut by removing an Iridescent Gem.
Ornate Pedestal[edit | edit source]
Ornate Pedestal
Empty
Active
Object Info
Perk
Activate with .
Miscellaneous
"archive_switch"
EmptyActive
“The socket is empty.”
–Wilson, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“Something's missing here.”
–Willow, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“Fancy pillar is empty. Too bad.”
–Wolfgang, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“It's not yet whole.”
–Wendy, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“REQUIRES GEM POWER”
–WX-78, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“It appears to require a specific gem to activate.”
–Wickerbottom, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“Anyone have a spare gem?”
–Woodie, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“I suppose I'll need to find a suitable gem.”
–Maxwell, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“It requires an öffering.”
–Wigfrid, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“It needs something shiny!”
–Webber, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“It's missing a key ingredient.”
–Warly, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“Missing...”
–Wormwood, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“This one needs a power source.”
–Winona, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“It craves something glittery.”
–Wortox, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“It missing a shiny...”
–Wurt, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“There's something missing...”
–Walter, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“There's something missing here.”
–Wanda, examining an empty Ornate Pedestal
“Those gems seem to power it... through entirely scientific means, I'm sure.”
–Wilson, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“I'm sure nobody would mind if I borrowed one of those gems.”
–Willow, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“There is strange hum coming from underneath.”
–Wolfgang, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“It already has its treasure.”
–Wendy, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“FULLY OPERATIONAL”
–WX-78, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“The pedestals seem to draw power from these gems.”
–Wickerbottom, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“Looks like this one's already set.”
–Woodie, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“It saps power from the gems.”
–Maxwell, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“This öne has been given an öffering.”
–Wigfrid, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“This one's all ready.”
–Webber, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“The gems seem to be important.”
–Warly, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“Awake”
–Wormwood, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“Seems like all three need a power source to complete the circuit.”
–Winona, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“It's clutching tightly to that treasure.”
–Wortox, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“Shiny!”
–Wurt, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“I think these gems might be important, Woby!”
–Walter, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
“Oh good, we got the lights working.”
–Wanda, examining an active Ornate Pedestal.
Ornate Pedestals are part of the Archive Switch. Iridescent Gems can be placed in each of the three Ornate Pedestals to activate the switch.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Console command to turn on the Archive Switch: require("debugcommands"); d_activatearchives().
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Archive Switch was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
Outwardly very similar to Ancient Beacon.

Attempting to place any other gem results in a failure message, but adding a third Iridescent Gem activates the switch. This powers the [[Archive Chandelier]]s, [[Ancient Orchestrina]], [[Ancient Guard Post]]s, and [[Fountain of Knowledge]]. Activating the switch for the first time immediately sets the [[Nightmare Cycle]] to the Nightmare Phase, playing a sound across all underground biomes.
